narrative:
Celina City has 7,042 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
